name: Pre-Emergency
characteristics: Foundational constitutional period with evolving centre-state conventions before the Emergency.

name: Emergency
characteristics: Centralized executive control and constrained democratic institutions during the Internal Emergency.

name: Post-Emergency
characteristics: Institutional recalibration after the Emergency, including renewed attention to federal safeguards.

name: Coalition Era
characteristics: Frequent coalition governments and intensified centre-state bargaining with recurring gubernatorial disputes.

name: Post-2014
characteristics: Majoritarian national politics and high-salience federal friction in opposition-ruled states.
